Display

Display

• Size 112 x 56 pixels
• Display size 2860 x 1860mm
• 5 colour RED/GREEN/YELLOW/BLUE/WHITE optical LED
• Light sensor
• Managed via phone & desktop application.
• NTCIP compliant, to connect into existing traffic management systems.

• Optional: Radar capability to display speed

Power Supply

• 330w Solar panel
• 2 x 260ah Deep Cycle Solar Batteries
• 1 x 30A Solar Charge Controller
• 1 x 220vAC battery charger with outdoor plug

Trailer

• 750KG Road Legal Trailer
• 14’ Tyre and rims
• 4 Height adjusted hoisters on corner of trailer.
• 1.5m above ground level.
• Swivel mechanism to allow 360 degree rotation of Display board
• Locking pin to hold board in position.
• Steel vandal proof box for battery and hydraulic lift
• Solar panel mounted in steel frame and welded to main structure.
• 20mm diameter chain fasten round axle to prevent theft.
• Licensed Trailer

Reliable Traffic Safety Equipment

At Roadsafe, we specialize in providing top-quality traffic control solutions to ensure public safety and smooth traffic management.

Comprehensive Machinery Selection

We offer a wide range of top-quality traffic control equipment, including Variable Message Signs (VMS), speed radars, and traffic safety lights. Our selection is designed to meet all your traffic management needs with reliability and efficiency.

Flexible and Customizable Rental

Our rental plans are tailored to suit your specific requirements. Whether you need equipment for a short-term project or long-term use, we offer flexible options to accommodate your schedule and budget.

Professional Maintenance Support

Our team provides professional maintenance support to ensure your equipment operates at peak performance. We handle all maintenance tasks, allowing you to focus on your project with confidence.

Expert & Personalized Consultation

We offer personalized consultations to help you choose the right traffic control solutions. Our experts are here to provide advice and support, ensuring you get the most effective equipment for your needs.

How it Works

Select Your Equipment

Decide which equipment you want.

Choose Your Purchase Plan

Choose between buying and renting.

Delivery and Support System

Get it delivered quickly and safely.

Testimonials

We have collected numerous anonymous testimonials over the years. These reviews reflect the positive experiences and satisfaction of our clients with our reliable equipment and exceptional support.

"Roadsafe's equipment has been a game-changer for our construction projects. The VMS units are reliable and easy to use, ensuring clear communication with motorists. Their support team is always responsive and helpful."

We've been renting speed radars and traffic safety lights from Roadsafe for over a year now. Their flexible rental plans and top-notch equipment have significantly improved safety in our high-risk zones. Highly recommend!

Roadsafe's personalized consultation helped us choose the right equipment for our needs. Their traffic safety lights are durable and effective, even in harsh weather conditions. Excellent service overall.

The professional maintenance support from Roadsafe ensures that our rented equipment is always in optimal condition. Their team is knowledgeable and efficient, making the rental process smooth and hassle-free.

Roadsafe's traffic safety lights have significantly improved visibility and safety during our nighttime roadworks. Their equipment is reliable and easy to set up, making our job much easier."

FAQS

Get answers to the most common questions we get.

Contact us using the form above if you can’t get your question answered on the FAQ.

see more faqs

What types of traffic control equipment do you offer for rent?

We offer Variable Message Signs (VMS), speed radars, and traffic safety lights to meet all your traffic management needs.

Can I customize the rental duration for the equipment?

Yes, we provide flexible rental plans tailored to suit your specific project requirements and duration

Do you provide maintenance support for rented equipment?

Absolutely. We offer professional maintenance support to ensure all our equipment operates at peak performance throughout the rental period.
